applicationWindow.notes: OTC for NR. Season opens Nov 1 statewide.

nr.notes: OTC NR deer ~$68 — among the cheapest. 90%+ of hunting is on private ranches; access (lease, day-hunt) is the real cost. Rio Grande and Hill Country genetics.

otc.notes: Statewide season opens Nov 1. Best hunting is private — plan for lease or day-hunt access fees.
